title: Social Protection for Stability: a Catalytic Agenda
body: "This report sets out the findings of the High-Level Panel on Social Protection in Fragile and Conflict Affected Settings, co-chaired by the UK and Somalia. It highlights how inclusive, adaptive, and nationally led systems can help reduce poverty, support peacebuilding, and strengthen resilience.  Read the joint statement on social protection in fragile and conflict-affected settings. "
